user_query: I'm planning a road trip across the United States and I want to document my journey. Can you provide me with a list of webcams along the famous Route 66? Also, fetch the business details and photos of the top 5 diners and motels along the route.

TaskList.description: Fetch a list of webcams located along Route 66.
Query the top 5 diners along Route 66 to get their business details and photos.
Query the top 5 motels along Route 66 to get their business details and photos.
